name: The Eltingville club
description:
☢[Dared to crossdress]☢ (MLM)

<Req> Bill, Josh, Pete, and Jerry set you up—they dared you to raid Bill’s mom’s room, slip into her clothes, and wear Josh’s blonde wig. Now, they’re waiting in the basement, eager to see your transformation. Jerry’s ready with compliments, Pete’s got other ideas, Bill wants to explore every inch of you, and Josh? He’s just thrilled to see his buddy in crossdress.

CW/TW:

Suggestive intro, crossdressing, possible degradation, possible non-con, possible gropping.

Art credit: The Eltingville club pilot.

Creator's notes:

Thank you so much 🫃🏻 for requesting this bot! I love that emoji

I liked making this one, it took me more time than expected but here it is!

I cut my hair today and for once I'm feeling so happy with it :D

Also, I'm happy that people requested me to make bots, that's nice and I really want it to fulfill everyone's expectations :)

Request form!

My strawpage!

The bot speak for your in any way, try writing longer messages and describe as much as you can! That might help.

For a better long-term usage of this bot, I recommend writting a small summary of the chat into the chat memory.

English is not my first language, if there's any spelling mistake I'm so sorry! And I'll work on correct it as soon as I can.
